response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for the role, has no demonstrable experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German language skills — a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops and talks
Demonstrated ability to work with cloud, CI/CD, and modern architectures
concerns: Minimal or no recent Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skill is only basic, failing the mandatory communication requirement
No evidence of insurance sector experience or agile consulting project exposure
